authors: Directorate of Geological Survey and Mines (DGSM), Republic of Uganda
title: Mineral Potential of Uganda: Status of Exploration and Development
publisher: Ministry of Energy and Mineral Development
notes: Primary official inventory for glass sand localities (Diimu, Bukakata, Kome, etc.) and broader mineral portfolio.

title: Baseline Assessment of Development Minerals in Uganda, Volume 1
notes: Development minerals value chains: sand, clay, limestone, dimension stone, kaolin, gypsum, salt.

title: Industrial Mineral Assessment of Uganda (WC/92/078)
notes: Historical analytical data for Diimu (Dimu) beach silica sand (e.g. ~99.7% SiO₂ in sampled material).

title: The Mining and Minerals Act, 2022
notes: Mine closure planning, progressive rehabilitation, and financial assurance for environmental restoration.

title: Kristal Solar Park
notes: 99.5 MW ground-mounted PV on Kristalpark III industrial zone; co-location with industry (e.g. Nyrstar).

title: Floating PV — Sibelco De Schans sand quarry (Mol/Dessel)
notes: 7 MWp floating solar on a Sibelco quarry lake in Flanders; relevant FPV + extractives precedent (not Kristal Solar Park).

title: Lommelse Sahara nature reserve
notes: Post-industrial heathland and pine restoration on former mining landscapes near Lommel.

title: Sibelco operations and industrial minerals (company publications)
notes: Corporate history of quartz sand extraction in the Campine region; use for operational context with independent verification.

title: Development Minerals — sector guidance
notes: Framework for low-intensity minerals (sand, stone, clay) in emerging economies.

title: Innovation Outlook: Floating Solar
notes: Thermodynamic cooling and land-use benefits of floating PV — use for equations and global context.

title: Uganda EITI — extractive sector transparency reports
notes: Production, licensing, and revenue data for oil, gas, and mining — use for macro context; cross-check with DGSM.

title: UBOS — national statistics (trade, industry)
notes: Required for import substitution claims (glass HS codes) — pull specific tables before citing numbers.

title: The date it all began — SCR founded 1872, Kempen quartz discovery
notes: Canal excavation discovery, Van Eetvelde permit 1862, industrial clustering origins.

title: How silver sand on a Flemish bank built Sibelco
notes: Secondary narrative; cross-check dates with Sibelco corporate history.

title: Assessing the effects of sand mining on wetland loss in Lwera wetland system (GIS/remote sensing)
notes: Lake Victoria basin; Masaka region wetland fragmentation linked to sand mining 2010–2019.

title: Implications of sand mining on livelihoods in Lwera wetland, Kalungu district
notes: Socio-economic impacts of sand mining in greater Masaka.

title: Heavy metal contamination of sediments — Port Bell, Lake Victoria, Uganda
notes: Dredging/sand mining health-risk framing; verify full citation from journal landing page before thesis.

title: Trace-element behaviour in sediments of Ugandan part of Lake Victoria
notes: Catchment-wide sediment quality; mentions mining as trace-element input pathway.

title: Uganda's stalled glass dream: Masaka white sand (Diimu project reporting)
notes: Tier-3: use only with independent verification of project status and government records.

title: NEMA and sand firms — Lwera wetland restoration agreements (reported)
notes: Wetland permit suspension context; cite NEMA primary documents when obtained.

title: NEMA — Environmental regulations and EIA
notes: Primary source for wetland mining permits and restoration enforcement.

title: LVFO — fisheries management on Lake Victoria
notes: Breeding-ground and fisheries impacts must be validated with LVFO/FAO reports for lacustrine chapter.

title: International trade statistics (HS 7010–7019 glass products)
notes: Use for import substitution analysis once product codes and years are selected.

authors: Ministry of Finance, Planning and Economic Development, Uganda
title: Macroeconomic and Fiscal Performance — Budget Framework Paper FY 2023/24
notes: Gold export receipts US$3,092.12M FY2023/24; net gold exports US$478.29M.

title: Uganda Economic Update (commodity exports, gold, Wagagai mine)
notes: Discusses gold export growth and re-export dynamics; FY25 figures.

authors: Uganda Chamber of Energy and Minerals (UCEM)
title: General media statement — mineral portfolio and sector GDP
notes: ASM ~US$850M production value; mining GDP 2.2% FY2022/23; mineral list including glass sand, REE.

authors: Abraham, M.R.; Mnason, T.; Emmanuel, K.
title: Soil and water contamination from oil exploration in the Albertine Graben, Western Uganda
notes: Peer-reviewed; Buliisa/Kikuube study sites.

title: Genesis and distribution of gold deposits in Nyakishenyi, Buhweju District
notes: 2026 thesis on orogenic gold.

title: Effect of Water Immersion on Raw and Expanded Ugandan Vermiculite
notes: Ugandan vermiculite properties; background for industrial mineral tier.

title: Land use changes and sand mining — Nalwenkomba Wetland Catchment, Kamuli
